title: Mildly Grilled Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A herbal and tender Malaysian dish, perfect for midnight cravings, featuring grilled chicken in a mixture of oil and spices, diabetic-friendly due to low sugar content.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, vegetable oil, lime juice, garlic, ginger, coriander, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and mix well to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
Thread the marinated chicken strips onto skewers, if using.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the chicken satay hot with your choice of sides, such as peanut sauce or cucumber salad.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
